questionHtml: Outline how a catalyst increases the rate of reaction.
markschemeHtml:
provides an alternative pathway/mechanism AND lower Ea ✔

Accept description of how catalyst lowers Ea (e.g. “reactants adsorb on surface «of catalyst»”, “reactant bonds weaken «when adsorbed»”).

meta.title: Outline how a catalyst increases the rate of reaction.
breadcrumbLabels: 6.1 Collision theory and rates of reaction
